description_p1: BPC-157 (Body Protection Compound-157) is a synthetic pentadecapeptide consisting of 15 amino acids, derived from a protective protein found in human gastric juice. It is classified as a stable gastric pentadecapeptide and has been the subject of extensive preclinical research since the 1990s.
description_p2: BPC-157 has been investigated in research settings for its interactions with the nitric oxide (NO) system, growth factor modulation (including EGF, VEGF, and FGF), and the FAK-paxillin pathway. Published studies have examined its effects in angiogenesis models, tendon-to-bone healing, gastrointestinal cytoprotection, and peripheral nerve regeneration in various animal models.
description_p3: Each vial from InfinityBio Labs contains lyophilized BPC-157 verified at ≥98% purity via HPLC analysis. All batches undergo independent third-party testing with full Certificates of Analysis available upon request. Supplied as a white lyophilized powder in a sealed sterile vial, suitable for reconstitution with sterile or bacteriostatic water.
storage: -20°C, protect from light and moisture. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 14 days.
solubility: Soluble in sterile water, bacteriostatic water (0.9% benzyl alcohol)
seo_description: Buy BPC-157 ≥98% purity. Research peptide for tissue repair studies. Third-party tested, COA available. Fast shipping.
faq_1_a: BPC-157 is a synthetic pentadecapeptide consisting of 15 amino acids, derived from a segment of the human gastric juice protein BPC. It is classified as a stable gastric pentadecapeptide and has been widely studied in preclinical research models since the early 1990s.
faq_2_a: Store lyophilized BPC-157 at -20°C in a dry location protected from light and moisture. After reconstitution with sterile or bacteriostatic water, store at 2-8°C and use within 14 days. Avoid repeated freeze-thaw cycles to maintain peptide integrity.
faq_3_a: Our BPC-157 is verified at ≥98% purity via High-Performance Liquid Chromatography (HPLC) analysis. Each production batch is independently tested by a third-party laboratory. Full Certificates of Analysis (COA) are available for every lot upon request.
faq_4_a: BPC-157 is supplied as a white lyophilized (freeze-dried) powder in a sealed sterile glass vial. Available in 5mg, 10mg, and 20mg quantities. The peptide should be reconstituted with sterile water or bacteriostatic water prior to use in research applications.
faq_5_q: What research has been published on BPC-157?
faq_5_a: BPC-157 has been the subject of numerous published studies spanning over two decades. Research has examined its interactions with growth factor pathways, the nitric oxide system, and tissue repair mechanisms in various animal models. Studies have been published in peer-reviewed journals including Current Neuropharmacology, the Journal of Physiology-Paris, and Neural Regeneration Research.
ref_1: Sikiric P. et al. (2018). "Brain-gut axis and pentadecapeptide BPC 157: Theoretical and practical implications." Current Neuropharmacology, 16(5), 566-583. PMID: 28974127
ref_2: Seiwerth S. et al. (2014). "BPC 157's effect on healing." Journal of Physiology-Paris, 108(2-3), 141-149. PMID: 24530605
ref_3: Vukojevic J. et al. (2022). "Pentadecapeptide BPC 157 and the central nervous system." Neural Regeneration Research, 17(3), 482-487. PMID: 34380874

description_p1: Semaglutide is a synthetic analog of the human glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1), engineered with structural modifications to extend its half-life and increase receptor binding affinity. It is a 31-amino-acid peptide with a C-18 fatty diacid chain attached via a linker to lysine at position 26.
description_p2: Semaglutide is actively researched for its high-affinity binding to the GLP-1 receptor, stimulating insulin secretion in a glucose-dependent manner while suppressing glucagon release. Studies have investigated its effects on gastric emptying kinetics, central appetite regulation via hypothalamic pathways, and pancreatic beta-cell preservation in metabolic research models.
description_p3: InfinityBio Labs provides semaglutide verified at ≥97% purity via HPLC analysis. Each vial is independently tested by accredited third-party laboratories with Certificates of Analysis documenting identity (mass spectrometry), purity (HPLC), and endotoxin levels. Supplied as a white to off-white lyophilized powder in sealed sterile vials.
storage: -20°C, protect from light. Reconstituted: 2-8°C, use within 30 days.
solubility: Soluble in sterile water, bacteriostatic water, or PBS (pH 7.4)
seo_description: Buy Semaglutide ≥97% purity. GLP-1 receptor agonist for metabolic research. Lab-tested, COA included. Fast shipping.
faq_1_a: Semaglutide is a synthetic GLP-1 (glucagon-like peptide-1) receptor agonist. It is a 31-amino acid peptide analog modified with a C-18 fatty diacid chain to extend its pharmacokinetic half-life. It is widely used in metabolic research and clinical studies.
faq_2_a: Store lyophilized semaglutide at -20°C protected from light. After reconstitution, store at 2-8°C and use within 30 days. Do not freeze reconstituted solution. Keep vials sealed until use to prevent moisture exposure.
faq_3_a: Our semaglutide is verified at ≥97% purity via HPLC analysis. Each batch undergoes third-party testing including mass spectrometry for identity confirmation and endotoxin testing. Certificates of Analysis are provided with every order.
faq_4_a: Semaglutide is supplied as a white to off-white lyophilized powder in sealed sterile glass vials. Available in multiple quantities from 2mg to 30mg. Reconstitute with sterile water or bacteriostatic water for research use.
faq_5_q: What is the mechanism of action studied in Semaglutide research?
faq_5_a: Semaglutide research focuses on its high-affinity binding to the GLP-1 receptor, which has been studied for glucose-dependent insulin secretion, glucagon suppression, delayed gastric emptying, and central appetite regulation through hypothalamic signaling pathways.
ref_1: Wilding J.P.H. et al. (2021). "Once-Weekly Semaglutide in Adults with Overweight or Obesity." New England Journal of Medicine, 384(11), 989-1002. PMID: 33567185
ref_2: Knudsen L.B. et al. (2019). "The Discovery and Development of Liraglutide and Semaglutide." Frontiers in Endocrinology, 10, 155. PMID: 31031702
ref_3: Marso S.P. et al. (2016). "Semaglutide and Cardiovascular Outcomes in Patients with Type 2 Diabetes." New England Journal of Medicine, 375(19), 1834-1844. PMID: 27633186

description_p1: Bacteriostatic Water (BW) is sterile water containing 0.9% benzyl alcohol as a bacteriostatic preservative. It is classified as a multi-use diluent designed for reconstitution of lyophilized compounds in research applications. Each vial meets USP standards for sterility and endotoxin limits.
description_p2: Bacteriostatic water is used in research settings as the standard reconstitution vehicle for lyophilized peptides, proteins, and other compounds. The 0.9% benzyl alcohol preservative inhibits microbial growth, allowing the reconstituted solution to be used over multiple sessions — unlike sterile water for injection, which must be discarded after a single use.
description_p3: InfinityBio Labs supplies bacteriostatic water manufactured under cGMP conditions and tested for sterility, endotoxin levels, and benzyl alcohol concentration. Each vial is sealed with a flip-off cap and rubber stopper suitable for multi-puncture withdrawal. Available in 10ml and 30ml vials.
storage: Room temperature (15-25°C), protect from light. Discard 28 days after first puncture.
seo_description: Buy bacteriostatic water for peptide reconstitution. USP-grade, 0.9% benzyl alcohol. Sterile, multi-use vials. Fast shipping.
faq_1_a: Bacteriostatic water is sterile water containing 0.9% benzyl alcohol as a preservative. The benzyl alcohol inhibits microbial growth, making it a multi-use diluent suitable for reconstituting lyophilized peptides and compounds in research settings.
faq_2_q: How is Bacteriostatic Water different from Sterile Water?
faq_2_a: Bacteriostatic water contains 0.9% benzyl alcohol, which prevents bacterial growth and allows multi-use over up to 28 days. Sterile water for injection contains no preservative and must be discarded after a single use.
faq_3_q: How should Bacteriostatic Water be stored?
faq_3_a: Store bacteriostatic water at room temperature (15-25°C) protected from direct light. Once the vial stopper has been punctured, use within 28 days. Do not freeze. Inspect for particulates or discoloration before each use.
